tables-dolly-7.draft_meta_title: Global Duet Tables Dolly DTD20 — For Duet Stacking Tables | Brant Business Interiors — a division of Office Central Inc. (OECM Supplier)
tables-dolly-7.draft_meta_desc: Global Duet DTD20 mobile dolly for Duet stacking tables. Stacks up to 20 tables, 300 lb capacity, 4 heavy-duty casters (2 locking), removable handle. Ships across Canada.
tables-dolly-7.draft_body_html:
Move a full stack of Duet tables across the room in one trip — the DTD20 dolly is the purpose-built transport cart for the Global Duet stacking table line.

The Global Duet DTD20 holds up to 20 stacked Duet tables and rolls on four heavy-duty casters — two of which lock in place for loading and unloading. The 1.5"×0.5" steel frame handles 300 lbs, and the removable handle tucks away when not in use. At 29.5"W × 63"D × 38.5"H it fits neatly in a storage room alongside a full set of tables. Designed specifically for the Duet DTS series.

Available from Brant Business Interiors — Canada's OECM-eligible commercial furniture supplier since 1964. Delivery across Canada; installation available in Ontario and Western Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565 for current pricing, bundle quotes, or lead times.

carpeted-floor-48-x-60.draft_body_html:
The larger-format DuraMat for bigger workstations — GREENGUARD-certified, lifetime-warranted floor protection for low-pile carpeted offices.

The CM13433F covers a 60" × 46" footprint, making it the right choice for L-shape desks, double-wide workstations, and executive setups on low-pile carpet up to 3/8" thick. The studded back grips carpet to prevent shifting; the beveled edge allows smooth on-and-off chair movement; and the wide 25"W × 12"L lip covers the under-desk foot zone. Clear vinyl is nonphthalate, noncadmium, BPA-free, and lead-free. No assembly required.

newland-16w-box-box-file-mobile-pedestal.draft_meta_desc: Global/Offices to Go Newland BBF mobile pedestal — 3 locking drawers, ball-bearing suspension, locking casters, ANSI/BIFMA + GREENGUARD. Made in Canada. Call 1-800-835-9565.
newland-16w-box-box-file-mobile-pedestal.draft_body_html:
Canadian-made, fully assembled, and ready to roll — the Newland BBF mobile pedestal delivers secure under-desk storage that meets ANSI/BIFMA, LEVEL, and GREENGUARD standards.

Built by Global Furniture Group on the Newland platform, this 16"W pedestal pairs two locking box drawers with a full-extension file drawer that handles letter (front-to-back) or legal (side-to-side) filing. Ball-bearing drawer suspension keeps movement smooth; front locking casters keep it where you put it. The 1" TFL top has a built-in grip overhang for easy repositioning. Sits flush under 30"D table desks or 24"D returns without a modesty panel. Ships fully assembled — no tools required.

shoptech-081.draft_body_html:
A heavy-duty fixed-height stool built for institutions — the Shoptech 081 handles daily volume use and wipes clean in seconds.

The 081 sits at 31" bar height with an injection-molded polyurethane seat featuring a built-in handle for easy repositioning. The black steel frame and footring absorb daily use without flex; heavy-duty non-slip glides keep it stable on hard floors without drifting. Wipe-clean construction suits any environment where hygiene matters. Standard at 31" — 18" and 25" seat heights available by special order.

shoptech-2300-pc775.draft_meta_title: Shoptech 2300 Sit/Stand Stool PC775 | Brant Business Interiors
shoptech-2300-pc775.draft_meta_desc: Shoptech 2300 sit/stand stool — 10° infinite-lock tilt, pneumatic height 19"–31.5", wipe-clean polyurethane, caster-height glides. Clean Room option available. Call 1-800-835-9565.
shoptech-2300-pc775.draft_body_html:
Built for standing-height workstations, the Shoptech 2300 keeps you supported between seated and standing positions with a 10° forward tilt and wipe-clean polyurethane construction.

The 2300's compact seat tilts 10° forward with infinite lock, promoting active posture at counter and standing-height surfaces. Pneumatic gas lift covers two height ranges — counter (19.25"–26.5") or extended (21.5"–31.5") — so it pairs with nearly any adjustable workstation. Standard with caster-height glides; a Clean Room Class 100 (CR) option is available for lab and healthcare environments requiring controlled-environment seating.
